requires.rationale: sub-entity has parent FK to same kind (struct → field)
sub-entity carries first-class metadata, not just data

structure.description: Sub-entity rendered as a nested expandable tree (column → nested struct field) where each row carries inline metadata controls (tags, glossary terms, business owner, PII flag). Sub-entity is a first-class metadata target, not a row of values.

rationale.hypothesis: When metadata can be attached at sub-entity granularity (tag a column, not just a dataset), surfacing metadata controls inside the row keeps the editing surface adjacent to the target. A separate metadata page per column would require N navigations for N edits.

evidence.description: Schema tab — column rows with inline tag/term/owner/PII pills
Column-level docs editable inline in schema view

counterexample.description: If sub-entity has no metadata of its own (e.g. Position in Portfolio = pure numeric), inline metadata controls are absent

shouldNotMatch.reason: Position is pure numeric — no per-row metadata
